name: WARRIOR MET COAL, INC.
business: Warrior Met Coal, Inc. is a U.S.-based supplier to the global steel industry, dedicated entirely to mining non-thermal steelmaking coal (hard coking coal) used as a critical component of steel production. It sells substantially all of its production to global steel producers, with customers in Europe, South America, and Asia. It also has natural gas operations.

exposures.sentence: We are a U.S.-based, environmentally and socially minded supplier to the global steel industry. We are dedicated entirely to mining non-thermal steelmaking coal used as a critical component of steel production by metal manufacturers in Europe, South America and Asia.
Other revenues are comprised of revenue derived from our natural gas operations, gains and losses on our natural gas hedges and earned royalty revenue.

catalysts.event: Commencement of longwall operations at Blue Creek mine
catalysts.sentence: We commenced longwall operations at the Blue Creek mine in October 2025, eight months ahead of schedule and on budget.

catalysts.event: Finalization of federal coal lease acquisition
catalysts.sentence: On November 25, 2025, Warrior Met Coal BC, LLC ..., a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, entered into Federal Coal Lease ALES-056519 at Mine No. 1 ... and Warrior Met Coal Mining, LLC ..., a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, entered into Federal Coal Lease ALES-055797 at Mine No. 4 ...

catalysts.event: Enactment of One, Big, Beautiful Bill Act
catalysts.sentence: On July 4, 2025, the One, Big, Beautiful Bill Act ('OBBBA') was enacted into law and includes significant provisions, such as the permanent extension of certain expiring provisions of the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act.
